remainingGap: TSK-023-04 later hardened selector-level regression checks in PR #676.
why: The seasonal theme token layer only works if visible form and drawer surfaces consume semantic tokens rather than raw values or browser-native affordances.

remainingGap: TSK-023-05 remains to record parent closeout evidence and close #668.
why: After migration, visible theme quality needed selector-level gates so scrollbars, form controls, and drawer surfaces could not drift back to hardcoded values.
